Import TensorFlow, keras_cv, tqdm, xml and other necessary modules
Define dataset parameters: batch_size=32, image_width=640, image_height=640
Create a synthetic dataset with random images of dimensions (batch_size, height, width, 3)
Label the synthetic dataset with dummy bounding boxes in 'xyxy' format and random class labels
Initialize the YOLOV8Detector model with num_classes based on the number of unique classes in the dataset, backbone='yolo_v8_s_backbone_coco'
Compile the model with Adam optimizer and loss functions: classification_loss='binary_crossentropy', box_loss='ciou'
Create a validation dataset similar to the training dataset for evaluation
Define EvaluateCOCOMetricsCallback to track mAP scores during training
Train the model using the fit method on the synthetic training data for 3 epochs, with validation_data set to the validation dataset and callbacks set to EvaluateCOCOMetricsCallback
Visualize detections on a subset of the validation dataset to ensure that predictions are being made
Monitor GPU memory usage during training to verify that it exceeds expected thresholds
